response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical education (workshops, talks)
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or OPC UA
No demonstrated experience with on-premises industrial automation platforms or cloud-native IoT solutions
